description: Comprehensive 17-dimension discovery tree for Sitecore XP AWS-to-Azure migration planning. Each dimension captures the infrastructure, configuration, and dependency details an architect needs to build a complete migration plan.

dimensions.name: Compute / Hosting
dimensions.description: Captures the current EC2-based hosting topology for Sitecore CM, CD, and supporting roles, including instance types, scaling configuration, and OS details needed to map to equivalent Azure App Services or VM SKUs.

required_questions.question: How many CM (Content Management) instances are running in production?
How many CD (Content Delivery) instances are running in production?
What EC2 instance type is used for CM servers?
What EC2 instance type is used for CD servers?
What Windows Server version is running on the Sitecore instances?
What version of Sitecore XP is deployed?
Are CD instances behind an Auto Scaling Group (ASG)?
How is Sitecore deployed on the EC2 instances?

conditional_questions.question: What are the Auto Scaling Group min/max instance counts for CD?
What scaling metric triggers CD auto-scaling?
Specify the custom EC2 instance type used for CM servers.
Which container registry stores the Sitecore images?
What Kubernetes version is the EKS cluster running?

dimensions.name: Database
dimensions.description: Captures SQL Server database topology including engine version, instance sizing, high availability configuration, and database sizes for Core, Master, Web, and xDB databases to plan the Azure SQL or SQL Managed Instance migration.

required_questions.question: What database engine hosts the Sitecore databases?
What SQL Server version is in use?
What RDS instance class (or EC2 instance type) hosts the databases?
What is the total size of all Sitecore databases combined (in GB)?
What high availability configuration is in place for the database?
Are xDB collection/reporting databases on a separate SQL instance from Core/Master/Web?
Are there custom databases (beyond standard Sitecore databases) on the same SQL instance?
Is Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) or RDS encryption at rest enabled?

conditional_questions.question: List the custom databases and their approximate sizes.
What RDS instance class hosts the xDB databases?
How many read replicas are configured for the database?
How many nodes are in the Always On Availability Group?
How are encryption keys managed?

dimensions.name: Search (Solr)
dimensions.description: Captures the Solr search infrastructure details including topology, version, index sizes, and custom configuration needed to plan migration to Azure Cognitive Search or Solr on Azure VMs.

required_questions.question: Which search provider is Sitecore configured to use?
What version of Solr is deployed?
How many Solr nodes are in the cluster?
How is Solr hosted?
What is the total Solr index size across all cores (in GB)?
Are there custom Solr indexes beyond the standard Sitecore indexes?
Is Solr configured with SSL/TLS for communication with Sitecore?

conditional_questions.question: List the custom Solr indexes and their approximate sizes.
How many ZooKeeper nodes are in the SolrCloud ensemble?
What replication factor is configured for SolrCloud collections?
What Coveo plan/tier is in use?
What SearchStax deployment tier and region is in use?

dimensions.name: Caching (Redis)
dimensions.description: Captures the Redis caching layer configuration including ElastiCache topology, node sizes, clustering, and how Sitecore roles use Redis for session state, output caching, or custom caching scenarios to plan Azure Cache for Redis migration.

required_questions.question: Is Redis used in the Sitecore environment?
How is Redis hosted?
What ElastiCache node type (or EC2 instance type) is used for Redis?
Is Redis cluster mode enabled?
What is Redis used for in the Sitecore environment?
What is the total allocated Redis memory (in GB)?

conditional_questions.question: How many Redis replica nodes are configured?
How many shards are configured in the Redis cluster?
What eviction policy is configured on the Redis instance?
Is in-transit encryption (TLS) enabled for Redis connections?
Is Redis AUTH (password authentication) enabled?

dimensions.name: CDN
dimensions.description: Captures the Content Delivery Network configuration including CloudFront distributions, caching behaviors, origin configuration, and any WAF rules to plan migration to Azure Front Door or Azure CDN.

required_questions.question: Is a CDN deployed in front of the Sitecore CD instances?
Which CDN provider is in use?
How many CDN distributions/configurations exist for Sitecore?
What caching strategy is used at the CDN layer?
options: Cache static assets only (CSS, JS, images)
Cache static assets and media library items
Cache full pages for anonymous users

required_questions.question: Is a WAF (Web Application Firewall) enabled on the CDN?
Are custom error pages configured at the CDN level?

conditional_questions.question: Approximately how many custom WAF rules are configured?
Which managed WAF rule sets are enabled?
options: AWS Managed Rules - Core Rule Set
AWS Managed Rules - Known Bad Inputs

conditional_questions.question: Are CloudFront Functions or Lambda@Edge functions in use?
Are geographic restrictions configured on the CDN?
Provide the third-party CDN account and configuration details.

inference_rules.condition: cdn_in_use == true && compute_hosting_model == 'IIS directly on EC2'

dimensions.name: DNS
dimensions.description: Captures DNS hosting and domain configuration including Route 53 zones, record types, TTL values, and routing policies to plan migration to Azure DNS or coordinate third-party DNS updates.

required_questions.question: Where are the Sitecore site DNS zones hosted?
How many DNS zones (domains) serve the Sitecore sites?
Approximately how many DNS records exist across all Sitecore-related zones?
What DNS routing policies are used for Sitecore traffic?
What is the typical TTL (in seconds) for Sitecore site A/CNAME records?
Are Route 53 or DNS-level health checks configured for failover?

conditional_questions.question: What endpoints are monitored by the DNS health checks?
What is the failover target when the primary health check fails?
Are Route 53 private hosted zones used for internal Sitecore service discovery?
Is DNSSEC signing enabled on the DNS zones?

dimensions.name: SSL / TLS
dimensions.description: Captures SSL/TLS certificate management including ACM certificates, certificate chains, termination points, and renewal processes to plan migration to Azure Key Vault certificates or App Service managed certificates.

required_questions.question: Where are SSL/TLS certificates managed?
How many unique SSL/TLS certificates are used across the Sitecore environment?
Are wildcard certificates used for Sitecore domains?
Where does SSL/TLS terminate?
What is the minimum TLS version enforced?
Are certificates set up for automatic renewal?

conditional_questions.question: What validation method is used for ACM certificates?
Describe the manual certificate renewal process and who owns it.
Is mutual TLS (client certificate authentication) used for any Sitecore endpoints?
Is certificate pinning enforced by any consuming applications or mobile apps?

dimensions.name: Storage / Media
dimensions.description: Captures how Sitecore media library items and other blobs are stored, including S3 buckets, blob providers, media cache sizes, and image resizing configuration to plan Azure Blob Storage migration.

required_questions.question: Where does Sitecore store media library blobs?
options: Amazon S3 via custom blob provider

required_questions.question: What is the total size of all media library content (in GB)?
Approximately how many media items are in the Sitecore media library?
How many S3 buckets are used by the Sitecore environment (media, logs, exports, etc.)?
Is Sitecore media image resizing used (on-the-fly image manipulation)?
What is the configured media cache size on each CD instance (in GB)?
Is a shared file system used between CM and CD instances (e.g., for media or deployment)?

conditional_questions.question: List the S3 bucket names and their purposes.
Which custom blob provider module is used for S3 integration?

condition.value: Amazon S3 via custom blob provider

conditional_questions.question: What shared file system type is in use?
options: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

conditional_questions.question: Is S3 versioning enabled on the media buckets?

condition.value: Amazon S3 via custom blob provider

conditional_questions.question: Are S3 lifecycle policies configured (e.g., transition to Glacier, expiration)?

inference_rules.condition: compute_cd_instance_count >= 2 && storage_media_strategy == 'Local file system on EC2'

inference_rules.value: Amazon S3 via custom blob provider

dimensions.name: Email (EXM)
dimensions.description: Captures the Sitecore Email Experience Manager (EXM) and email delivery configuration including SMTP providers, dispatch servers, throttling, and custom message types to plan migration to Azure Communication Services or equivalent.

required_questions.question: Is Sitecore EXM (Email Experience Manager) actively used for email campaigns?
What SMTP/email delivery service is used?
What is the approximate monthly email send volume?
Is there a dedicated EXM dispatch server (separate from CM/CD)?
Are custom EXM email templates or message types deployed?
Does Sitecore send transactional emails (password resets, form submissions, order confirmations)?

conditional_questions.question: How many verified sending identities (domains/emails) are configured in SES?
Is the SES account still in sandbox mode or in production mode?
How many custom EXM templates are deployed?
What EC2 instance type runs the dedicated EXM dispatch server?
Describe any email throttling or rate-limiting configuration in place.

inference_rules.condition: email_exm_in_use == true && database_engine == 'Amazon RDS for SQL Server'

dimensions.name: xConnect / xDB
dimensions.description: Captures the xConnect and xDB analytics infrastructure including collection services, processing roles, reporting configuration, and contact data volumes to plan Azure-equivalent analytics pipeline migration.

required_questions.question: Is xConnect / xDB analytics tracking enabled in the Sitecore environment?
How many xConnect service instances are running?
What database type is used for the xDB Collection database?
Approximately how many contacts are stored in xDB?
Is the xConnect Processing role running (for aggregation and ML)?
Is the xConnect Search Indexer role running?
Is Marketing Automation (MA) enabled and in use?
Are custom xDB contact facets deployed?

conditional_questions.question: List the custom xDB contact facets and their data models.
How many active Marketing Automation plans are deployed?
Is xConnect hosted on separate EC2 instances from CM/CD?
What is the size of the xDB Collection database (in GB)?
What data retention policy is configured for xDB contact interactions?

dimensions.name: Identity
dimensions.description: Captures the Sitecore Identity Server configuration, federated authentication providers, and role/claim mappings to plan migration to Azure AD B2C or equivalent identity infrastructure.

required_questions.question: Is Sitecore Identity Server deployed (introduced in Sitecore 9.1)?
How is Sitecore Identity Server hosted?
Which external identity providers are integrated with Sitecore for editor/admin login?
Is federated authentication used for front-end visitor login (extranet)?
Are custom claims or role mappings configured in the identity pipeline?
Is Single Sign-On (SSO) enabled across multiple Sitecore instances or related applications?

conditional_questions.question: Which identity provider handles front-end visitor authentication?
Describe the custom claims and role-mapping rules configured.
List the applications participating in the SSO configuration.
What version of ADFS is in use?
Is multi-factor authentication enforced for Sitecore CMS editor login?

dimensions.name: Session State
dimensions.description: Captures how ASP.NET session state is managed across the Sitecore topology, including private and shared session providers, session timeouts, and sticky session configuration to plan the Azure-equivalent session architecture.

required_questions.question: What session state provider is used for private sessions on CD servers?
What provider is used for shared sessions (xDB tracker sessions)?
What is the configured session timeout (in minutes)?
Are sticky sessions (session affinity) enabled on the load balancer?
What is the approximate average session size (in KB)?
What is the peak number of concurrent sessions during high traffic?

conditional_questions.question: Which Redis database index is used for session state?
What is the sticky session cookie name configured on the load balancer?
Describe the custom session state provider implementation.
What is the name of the SQL Server session state database?

dimensions.name: Custom Integrations
dimensions.description: Captures third-party and custom integration points with the Sitecore environment including CRM, ERP, DAM, PIM, and API integrations that must be validated and potentially reconfigured during migration.

required_questions.question: Is Sitecore integrated with a CRM system?
Which CRM platform is integrated?
Is a Digital Asset Management (DAM) system integrated with the Sitecore media library?
How many custom API integrations (REST/SOAP/GraphQL) does Sitecore consume or expose?
Which AWS-specific services does the Sitecore application directly integrate with?
Which Sitecore marketplace or third-party modules are installed?
Is a payment gateway integrated with the Sitecore solution?

conditional_questions.question: How is the CRM integration implemented?
Which DAM platform is integrated?
How many of the custom API integrations connect to internal systems vs. external/SaaS systems?
Which payment gateway provider is integrated?
What version of Sitecore Commerce is deployed?

dimensions.name: CI/CD
dimensions.description: Captures the continuous integration and deployment pipeline configuration including build tools, artifact management, deployment strategies, and environment promotion workflows to plan equivalent Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions pipelines.

required_questions.question: What CI/CD platform is used to build and deploy the Sitecore solution?
Where is the Sitecore solution source code hosted?
What deployment strategy is used for CD instance updates?
options: Rolling update (one instance at a time)

required_questions.question: Where are build artifacts stored?
How many environments are in the deployment pipeline (e.g., Dev, QA, Staging, Prod)?
How are Sitecore items serialized and deployed?
Are automated tests included in the CI/CD pipeline?

conditional_questions.question: How many stages are in the CodePipeline configuration?
How is blue/green deployment orchestrated (e.g., Route 53 weighted, ALB target group swap)?
What types of automated tests run in the pipeline?
Are manual approval gates configured between environments?
Are Docker images built as part of the CI/CD pipeline?

dimensions.name: Monitoring
dimensions.description: Captures the observability stack including application performance monitoring, log aggregation, alerting configuration, and health-check endpoints to plan migration to Azure Monitor, Application Insights, or equivalent services.

required_questions.question: What Application Performance Monitoring (APM) tool is used?
How are Sitecore application logs aggregated and stored?
Are automated alerts configured for Sitecore infrastructure and application health?
Are custom health-check endpoints deployed on Sitecore CM/CD?
Are custom application metrics collected from Sitecore (beyond default infrastructure metrics)?
What uptime SLA target is defined for the Sitecore platform?

conditional_questions.question: What notification channels are used for alerts?
Approximately how many alert rules are configured?
Describe the custom metrics being collected from Sitecore.
What is the log retention period (in days)?
Are synthetic monitoring / uptime checks configured?

dimensions.name: Networking / Firewall
dimensions.description: Captures the VPC, subnet, security group, and network connectivity configuration including VPN tunnels, peering connections, and firewall rules to plan Azure Virtual Network and NSG migration.

required_questions.question: How many VPCs contain Sitecore infrastructure components?
What subnet tiers exist in the Sitecore VPC?
Across how many Availability Zones is the Sitecore infrastructure deployed?
Is there a VPN or Direct Connect connection from AWS to the corporate network?
What type of load balancer is used in front of CD instances?
options: No load balancer (CDN direct to single instance)

required_questions.question: Are NAT Gateways used for outbound internet access from private subnets?
How is administrative access to EC2 instances managed?

conditional_questions.question: What type of VPN or connectivity is in use?
What is the provisioned bandwidth for the VPN/Direct Connect (in Mbps)?
Are there VPC peering connections to other VPCs (e.g., shared services, other applications)?
Approximately how many security groups are associated with Sitecore infrastructure?
Are VPC endpoints configured for AWS services (S3, RDS, etc.) to avoid public internet traffic?

dimensions.name: Backup / DR
dimensions.description: Captures disaster recovery strategy, backup schedules, retention policies, RTO/RPO targets, and multi-region configuration to plan Azure Backup, Azure Site Recovery, and geo-redundant architecture.

required_questions.question: How are Sitecore database backups managed?
options: SQL Server native backups to S3

required_questions.question: What is the database backup retention period (in days)?
What is the target Recovery Point Objective (RPO) in hours?
What is the target Recovery Time Objective (RTO) in hours?
Is a secondary AWS region configured for disaster recovery?
Are EC2 AMI (machine image) backups taken regularly?
Is there a documented and tested disaster recovery plan?
How are media library and file-based assets backed up?
options: Covered by database backups (blobs in SQL)

conditional_questions.question: Which secondary AWS region is used for DR?
What DR strategy is implemented in the secondary region?
options: Pilot light (minimal resources, scale up on failover)

conditional_questions.question: How frequently are EC2 AMI backups taken?
When was the DR plan last tested?
Is point-in-time recovery enabled for the database?

inference_rules.value: Covered by database backups (blobs in SQL)

inference_rules.condition: storage_media_strategy == 'Amazon S3 via custom blob provider'
